Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive. Your ghouls and cage control spacing. Trade with ghouls.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — use cage to deny his spacing.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Use cage and ghouls to zone. Don't extend.
Darius.mid_game: Your ghouls and maiden scale. His ult is deadly — avoid low HP.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through maiden and split push. He struggles 1v1 vs maiden.
Darius.win_condition: Use cage to zone. Summon maiden when needed. Split push late.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through maiden and split push.
Darius.positioning: Use cage to zone. Control ghouls. Split push.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence doesn't affect your ghouls. Your cage and ghouls zone him. Trade with ghouls.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — use cage to deny his approach.
Garen.early_game: Dominate with cage and ghouls. Garen can't close gap with cage.
Garen.mid_game: Your ghouls and maiden control. His tankiness scales but you're stronger.
Garen.late_game: You outscale through maiden and split push. He's weaker.
Garen.win_condition: Dominate with cage and ghouls. Summon maiden. Split push.
Garen.scaling: You outscale through maiden and split push.
Garen.positioning: Use cage to zone. Control ghouls. Split push late.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry blocks your ghouls' damage. Your cage helps but she's mobile. Trade carefully.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — use cage to negate her engagement instead of ghouls.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora dominates early. Use cage defensively. Ghouls don't help much.
Fiora.mid_game: Your maiden scales. Her split push is strong. Avoid 1v1s.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through maiden. Avoid dueling her.
Fiora.win_condition: Use cage defensively. Summon maiden. Avoid her 1v1.
Fiora.positioning: Use cage defensively. Summon maiden. Avoid duels.

Jax.late_game: You outscale through maiden. Avoid dueling him.

Jax.positioning: Use cage defensively. Summon maiden. Avoid duels.

Riven.scaling: You outscale through maiden and split.
Riven.positioning: Use cage defensively. Summon maiden. Split push.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your ghouls zone him completely. Dominate early.

Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through maiden and split.

Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through maiden.
Nasus.positioning: Zone with ghouls early. Split push with maiden late.
